name: moraine-agent-workflows
description: Developer-only agent workflows for contributing to Moraine.

interface.longDescription: Project-local, developer-only skills that help agents contribute to Moraine consistently: start isolated work, author reviewable pull requests, run facet-specific code review personas, and validate behavior in the dev sandbox.
defaultPrompt: Use $moraine-start-work to begin a Moraine change safely.
Use $code-review to run all review personas on this PR.
Use $moraine-author-pr to draft a PR title and description.
